Is GN Store Nord (CPSE:GN) Now Fairly Priced After Volatile Recent Share Performance
news.summary: If you are wondering whether GN Store Nord is priced attractively today, the recent share performance gives you some useful clues before getting into the valuation work. The stock last closed at DKK 98.04, with a 7 day return of 2.8% decline, a 30 day return of 7.9%, a year to date return of 10.8% decline, a 1 year return of 8.1%, a 3 year return of 36.4% decline, and a 5 year return of 81.5% decl
